text: Being here, I am struck by the sense of possibility that these spaces evoke. The transparent glass and open design suggest a world of ideas not yet fully discovered, fostering curiosity. The R+D display—a space dedicated to responsiveness and development—invites me to contemplate the evolving connection between humans and intelligent machines. Surrounded by vibrant colors, illuminated words, and interactive screens, I feel a stimulating mixture of excitement and responsibility, compelled to ponder the balance between innovation and coexistence.
